turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I'm really nervous about learning to drive. I've never been in a car by myself before and the thought of it is stressing me out.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: It's completely normal to feel that way! Driving can be intimidating at first, but with practice, you'll get more comfortable. Have you talked to your parents or someone who has taught others how to drive?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yeah, my dad said he'd help me out. But I'm still worried about making mistakes and feeling like a beginner.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: That's totally understandable! Just remember that everyone starts as a beginner. Focus on the basics like checking mirrors and adjusting your seat. Don't worry too much about making mistakes; they're part of the learning process.
